title: Extracted finding from a corpus paper
description: A single load-bearing claim from a paper, extracted into structured form so the MCP can answer queries like 'what did anyone find about technique X' without re-reading every paper.

paper.description: Paper id (matches a record in corpus/papers/).

kind.description: What kind of claim this finding represents.

summary.description: One- to three-sentence statement of the finding. Specific, citation-grade. Numbers preserved.

techniques.description: Detection / blocking techniques this finding pertains to. Taxonomy IDs.

defenses.description: Defenses this finding pertains to. Taxonomy IDs.

defense_implications.description: Action-oriented bullets: what should a circumvention tool builder do in light of this finding?

section.description: Section / page reference in the paper, e.g. '§4.2' or 'Table 3'.

extracted_by.description: Who/what extracted this finding (e.g. 'claude-opus-4-7', 'manual'). Findings extracted by an LLM should be human-validated before being merged.
